arts.ttl: Revealed: The x-rated insult David Coote 'used to describe Andy Robertson' after clashing with the Liverpool star... after man said to be suspended Premier League referee was 'filmed snorting white powder'
arts.sum: Premier League referee Coote has been suspended by the PGMOL after a video emerged showing him calling Klopp a 'German ****' and 'f***ing arrogant'. Coote also called Liverpool 's***'.

arts.ttl: Scotland can use Croatia formula as path to glory as Craig Gordon tells Tartan Army they'll go all out at Hampden
arts.sum: Steve Clarke and his troops are fighting to hang on to their place among Europe's elite in the Nations League
